overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza at dusk, crossing a street, and proceeding through a covered commercial corridor beneath elevated highways. The environment features wet reflective pavement, towering digital billboards, and dense cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with benches and food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza, passing white benches and food stalls while heading toward the street crossing

notable_agents.action: sitting on a white bench near the food stall

entered.detail: row of modern white concrete benches lining the left side of the plaza walkway
large overhead digital billboard displaying noodle advertisement with purple and yellow colors
small yellow-roofed food vendor kiosk with red signage
mature trees with dense green foliage growing through the plaza pavement
tall modern building with reflective glass windows and teal structural elements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban plaza with wet reflective pavement suggesting recent rain. White concrete benches line the left side while a yellow food stall sits on the right. Large digital billboards hang overhead between modern glass buildings. The character walks forward through sparse pedestrian traffic toward an opening in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow zebra crossing

events.description: exits the covered plaza and approaches the open street intersection
steps onto the yellow striped crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk while moving with the flow of pedestrians toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the road perpendicular to the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes spanning the asphalt road
tall vertical digital billboard mounted on a yellow structural pillar displaying 'SWEAT SPEED 2'
multi-lane dark asphalt road with blue painted curb lines
tall pole with traffic signals and additional signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the plaza into a wide urban intersection. The ground transitions to yellow-striped asphalt as the character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians. A prominent vertical billboard displays 'SWEAT SPEED 2' on a yellow pillar, while vehicles pass on the road. The scene opens up to the sky with modern buildings surrounding the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon advertisements

events.description: enters the covered corridor with glass canopy roof and illuminated shop fronts

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered corridor, passing various pedestrians and illuminated shop fronts

notable_agents.action: person in red hat walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: arched transparent glass and metal roof structure covering the walkway
large illuminated billboard with 'CIRRUS' text in red and white colors
illuminated advertisement poster with teal background on the right wall
suspended horizontal billboard displaying medical advertisement with 'WE CAN HELP' text
storefront with bright neon signage reading 'TURBO DELIGHTS' in green and red

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered commercial corridor with a glass canopy roof overhead. The walls are lined with bright neon advertisements and illuminated shop fronts including 'TURBO DELIGHTS' and various billboards. The lighting shifts to artificial neon tones of teal, red, and purple. The walkway is populated with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: exits the covered corridor into the open street area beneath the concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the elevated highway structure toward the distant intersection

entered.detail: massive elevated concrete highway or monorail structure spanning overhead with thick support beams
tall brutalist concrete wall with horizontal lines running along the right side
tall futuristic towers visible in the distance beyond the overpass
ground level commercial establishments with illuminated signs along the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character exits the neon-lit corridor into a broader street area beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment shifts to brutalist concrete architecture with a retaining wall on the right and support pillars overhead. Natural light filters in from the far end of the street where distant skyscrapers are visible. The pedestrian density decreases as the character walks toward an intersection in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a reflective urban plaza through a neon-lit commercial district and into a brutalist concrete underpass. It begins in a covered plaza with wet pavement and digital billboards, moving forward past white benches and a yellow food stall toward a distant opening. As the character emerges from the plaza, the scene opens up into a wide intersection where the ground transitions to yellow-striped asphalt and a prominent vertical billboard for Sweat Speed 2 towers over the passing traffic. The camera then shifts into a narrow commercial corridor beneath a glass canopy, where the lighting transforms into artificial teal, red, and purple neon tones reflecting off illuminated shop fronts. Finally, the character exits the neon glow into a broader street area dominated by massive concrete overpass pillars and retaining walls, moving toward distant skyscrapers as the environment shifts to a starker, brutalist architectural style.
